title: Board-approved reclassification request by Shreyas Shibulal and Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal
detailed_summary: Infosys disclosed that its Board approved a request received from Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal to reclassify their names from the 'Promoter and promoter group' category to 'Public' under Regulation 31A of the SEBI Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements Regulations, 2015. The document does not disclose shareholding percentages, financial impact, or any change in management control.

key_facts.fact: The Board of Infosys approved the request received from Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal for reclassification from 'Promoter and promoter group' to 'Public'.
The reclassification request was made in terms of Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
The prior disclosure regarding Board approval was made on April 30, 2026.

corporate_actions.description: Board-approved request to reclassify Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal from 'Promoter and promoter group' to 'Public'.

important_text_spans.text: approval by the Board of the Company for  the  request  received  from  Mr.  Shreyas  Shibulal  and  Ms.  Bhairavi  Madhusudhan  Shibulal  seeking reclassification of their names from the category of 'Promoter and promoter group' of the Company to 'Public'
